_comment: Expected Gemini CLI output for canonical/multi-event.json. Conversions: (1) before_tool_execute + array ['shell','file_write'] -> two BeforeTool entries (one per tool, Gemini doesn't support regex alternation in toolMatcher); (2) after_tool_execute + wildcard -> AfterTool with no toolMatcher; (3) before_prompt -> BeforeAgent; (4) agent_stop -> AfterAgent. Timeout seconds -> milliseconds.
